## Vector

```json
  "expected_result": "PASS",
  "action_ref": "<expected SHA-256 hex digest>",
  "preimage": {
    "action_type": "",
    "agent_id": "",
    "scope": "",
    "timestamp": ""
  },
  "notes": ""
}
```
